trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. The Altroconsumo article (published 2025‑08‑29) recommends the two DOP‑labelled balsamic vinegars as the most authentic and high‑quality options, but the information is older than 60 days.
